items.title: 8BitDo’s officially licensed Jade Green Xbox Ultimate wireless gamepad with Hall effect just hit a $40 all-time low
items.summary:
Woot is now offering 8BitDo’s Jade Green Ultimate Xbox controller for $39.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise) as part of its updated video game sale. This controller typically sells for $70, so you’re looking at a solid 43% discount here. Today’s deal knocks $30 off its regular price, easily undercutting previous lows we’ve tracked since its debut last year. We tracked it at $50 earlier this year at Amazon, and it’s now going for $10 less than that. It’s compatible with multiple platforms, including Xbox consoles, PC, and Android devices, and you can find more details on its features below.

Best Buy is also offering the RTX 5060 version of this notebook for $1,149.99 shipped, which is also within $100 of the lowest price we’ve tracked for it. Both of these machines offer some serious value for your money, so be sure to snag them if you’re in the market for a gaming laptop after getting more details below.
